"Trigger all lights to 100%" then change brightness to 100% #backtonormal. 09-06-16: I Tested the Applet & documented in my memory log For me, this Applet DOES NOT change my colored bulbs back to white if the bulb(s) are set to a specific color (either when off or when on)- the Applet triggers the specific bulbs to 100 % density in the last set color - THE Applet DOES NOT CHANGE THE BULB COLOR BACK TO WHITE.I copied this published IFTTT Applet from www.mosaic.com Currently, IFTTT does not allow creating AppletS for HUE GROUPS Each Hue Bulb requires creating an individual Applet & then triggering each bulb individually -not in GROUPS-  It is for this reason that I create MY PUBLISHED TEMPLATES in an attempt to quicken the Applet programming process for the four individual bulbs that I have in ONE GROUP.
